channel.title: Personal on istvn.urbn
channel.description: Recent content in Personal on istvn.urbn

item.title: after the snap
item.description: I’m ready for a “New Year, New Me” - with a healthy dose of skepticism. I just have to remember to actually write something!

item.title: marginal success
item.description: Turns out I’m better at dreaming up posts than actually writing them - maybe tweaking the blog itself will solve the problem.
